rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN CAMPBELL ET AL VS. PACIFIC ARMS GOUGH STREET LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Documents, Set One From Defendant Pacific Arms Gough Street Llc;; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And Defendants Attorney Of Record, Gregory De La Pena, In The Amount Of $1,167
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 7, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF STEPHEN CAMPBELL, MAXWELL MCINTIRE Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Documents, Set One From Defendant Pacific Arms Gough Street Llc;; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And Defendants Attorney Of Record, Gregory De La Pena, In The Amount Of $1,167 is continued to October 31, 2019 to provide the Defendant an opportunity to serve updated response as represented to the judge pro tem by October 21, 2019. Status Report to be filed no later than October 28, 2019. =(501/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JOE NOWELL VS. LAURA CASTANON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 7, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT LAURA CASTANON, EDGAR HERNANDEZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to comply with SFRO 37.9(e)(1). See Notice Page 4, bottom of the page. Additionally, Plaintiff failed to comply with SFRO 37.9C(c). Tender (as reflected in the last two lines of the Notice referenced above) does not conform to the allegation/information regarding the amount which each tenant is purportedly entitled to receive ($3,490) according to the Notice =(501/HEK)
